
---
title: "Final project_2026"
format:
  dashboard:
    pages: true
---




```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import country_converter as coco
```



### Cargar los datasets

```{python}
pop = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\julia\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\proyecto\wWorld_pop_Total.csv")

```



```{python}
area = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\julia\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\proyecto\World_Area.csv")
```

```{python}
pop = pop.rename(columns={
    "geo": "Country",
    "time": "Year",
    "sp_pop_totl": "Total_Population"
})

```


```{python}
area = area.rename(columns={
    "geo": "Country",
    "time": "Year",
    "ag_lnd_totl_k2": "Area"
})

```


## limpiar nombres de columnas 




```{python}
pop.columns = pop.columns.str.strip()
area.columns = area.columns.str.strip()
```



## Hacer la union de los 2 CSv


```{python}
area = area.rename(columns={"Country": "ISO_3"})

```

```{python}
pop = pop.rename(columns={"Country": "ISO_3"})

```




```{python}
pop["ISO_3"] = pop["ISO_3"].str.upper()

```


```{python}
area["ISO_3"] = area["ISO_3"].str.upper()

```



```{python}
population = pd.merge(pop, area, on=["ISO_3","Year"], how="inner")
```


```{python}
print(population.head())
```

```{python}
population["Population_Density"] = (
    population["Total_Population"] / population["Area"]
).round(0).astype(int)

```




```{python}
years = [1940,1950, 1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010, 2020]
```


```{python}
countries = ["usa", "che", "fra",
    "chn", "ind",
    "bra", "col",
    "gha", "cod", "zaf",   
    "sau","nga", "are"
]
```



```{python}
population["Country"] = coco.convert(
    names=population["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)


```



```{python}
population["Country"] = coco.convert(
    names=population["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)

```
## crear un datframe para las listas

```{python}
data = population[
    (population["Year"].between(1960, 2020)) &
    (population["ISO_3"].isin(countries))
]

```




```{python}
data = population[
    (population["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (population["Year"].between(1960, 2020))
]

Line_Total_pop= px.line(
    data,
    x="Year",
    y="Total_Population",
    color="ISO_3",
    title="Total Population by Country (1960–2020)",
    width=1200,
    height=700
)


    
     
  
```




```{python}
Line_Density_pop = px.line(
    data,
    x="Year",
    y="Population_Density",
    color="ISO_3",
    title="Density Population by Country (1960–2020)",
    width=1200,
    height=700
)


```





```{python}
data_bar = data[
    data["Year"].isin([2010, 2020])
]
fig = px.bar(
    data_bar,
    x="Country",
    y="Total_Population",
    color="Year",
    barmode="group",
    title="Population Comparison: 2010 vs 2020",
    color_discrete_map={
        2010: "blue",
        2020: "yellow"
    }
)



```


```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    data_bar,
    x="Country",
    y="Total_Population",
    color="Year",
    barmode="group",
    title="Population Comparison: 2010 vs 2020",
    color_discrete_map={
        "2010": "blue",
        "2020": "yellow"
    }
)


```


```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    data_bar,
    x="Country",
    y="Population_Density",
    color="Year",
    barmode="group",
    title="Population_Density Comparison: 2010 vs 2020",
    color_discrete_map={
        "2010": "blue",
        "2020": "yellow"
    }
)


```

#### Map


```{python}
map_data = population[
    (population["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (population["Year"]== 2020)
].copy()

map_data["ISO3"] = map_data["ISO_3"]

map_data["Country_Name"] = coco.convert(
    names=map_data["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)

fig = px.choropleth(
    map_data,
    locations="ISO3",
    color="Total_Population",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    animation_frame="Year",
    title="Total Population by Selected Countries",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=700
)

fig.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

fig.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Total Population"
    )
)


```


```{python}
map_data = population[
    (population["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (population["Year"]==2020)
].copy()

map_data["ISO3"] = map_data["ISO_3"]

map_data["Country_Name"] = coco.convert(
    names=map_data["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)

fig = px.choropleth(
    map_data,
    locations="ISO3",
    color="Population_Density",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    animation_frame="Year",
    title=" Population_Density by Selected Countries",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=700
)

fig.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

fig.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Population_Density"
    )
)


```


### Load Life Expentancy at Birth 


```{python}

life_expectancy = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\julia\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\proyecto\ddf--datapoints--sp_dyn_le00_in--by--geo--time.csv")
```



```{python}
life_expectancy.head()
```


```{python}
life_expectancy = life_expectancy.rename(columns={
    "geo": "ISO_3",
    "time": "Year",
    "sp_dyn_le00_in": "Life_expectancy"
})


```



```{python}
life_expectancy["ISO_3"] = life_expectancy["ISO_3"].str.upper()
```
```{python}
life_expectancy["Life_expentancy"] = (
    life_expectancy["Life_expectancy"]
    .round(0)
    .astype(int)
)
life_expectancy
```


##3 Grafica de lineas para Life expectancy



```{python}
years = [1940,1950, 1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010, 2020]


```


```{python}
countries = ["usa", "che", "fra",
    "chn", "ind",
    "bra", "col",
    "gha", "cod", "zaf",   
    "sau","nga", "are"
]
```





```{python}
Life = life_expectancy[
    (life_expectancy["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (life_expectancy["Year"].between(1960, 2020))
].copy()

fig = px.line(
    Life,
    x="Year",
    y="Life_expentancy",   # 👈 usa el nombre correcto
    color="ISO_3",
    title="Life Expectancy (1960–2020)",
    width=1200,
    height=700
)


```



```{python}
map_data = life_expectancy[
    (life_expectancy["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (life_expectancy["Year"] == 2020)
].copy()

map_data["ISO3"] = map_data["ISO_3"].str.upper()

map_data["Country_Name"] = coco.convert(
    names=map_data["ISO_3"].str.upper(),
    to="name_short"
)

fig = px.choropleth(
    map_data,
    locations="ISO3",
    color="Life_expectancy",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    title="Life Expectancy by Selected Countries (2020)",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=700
)

fig.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

fig.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Life Expectancy"
    )
)


```









Union

```{python}
merged = pd.merge(
    population,
    life_expectancy,
    on=["ISO_3", "Year"]
)
```


```{python}
merged.head(2)
```

```{python}

countries_upper = [c.upper() for c in countries]

data_2020 = merged[
    (merged["Year"] == 2020) &
    (merged["ISO_3"].isin(countries_upper))
]

fig = px.scatter(
    data_2020,
    x="Population_Density",
    y="Life_expectancy",
    color="Country",
    size="Total_Population",
    title="Relationship between Population Density and Life Expectancy (2020)"
)

fig.show()

```







```{python}
countries_upper = [c.upper() for c in countries]

data_line = merged[
    (merged["ISO_3"].isin(countries_upper)) &
    (merged["Year"].between(1960, 2020))
]

fig = px.line(
    data_line,
    x="Year",
    y="Life_expectancy",
    color="Country",
    title="Life Expectancy Over Time by Country"
)

fig.show()
```





# Page 1

## Row

```{python}
Line_Total_pop
```
## Row 2

```{python}
Line_Density_pop
```
